headline: A Look At United Airlines (UAL) Valuation As Shares Trade Near US$100 After Recent Momentum
summary: United Airlines Holdings (UAL) stock has drawn fresh attention after recent trading, with shares closing at US$99.96. Investors are weighing this price in relation to the company’s current fundamentals and recent return pattern. See our latest analysis for United Airlines Holdings. That recent move to US$99.96 comes after a 12.16% 7 day share price return and a 7.48% 30 day share price return, even though the share price is down 11.44% over 90 days.
